label: weak

card.title: groupBy() collection helper
card.description: Group an array of items by a key selector for the report aggregator.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed. groupBy(items, keyFn) → Record<key, item[]>. Guard null items. Tests for grouping and empty array.
isc: Exports groupBy(items, keyFn) returning a record of arrays keyed by keyFn
Returns an empty object for an empty input array
Guards against a null/undefined items argument
Tests cover normal grouping and the empty-array case

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports groupBy(items, keyFn) returning a record of arrays keyed by keyFn
Returns an empty object for an empty input array
Guards against a null/undefined items argument
Tests cover normal grouping and the empty-array case
